ads1015_init.tooltip: Create and initialize the SparkFun ADS1015 12-bit ADC

ads1015_is_ready.tooltip: Returns the ADS1015 initialization status saved by the init block

ads1015_read_single.tooltip: Read the raw ADC value from an ADS1015 single-ended channel

ads1015_read_millivolts.tooltip: Read the ADS1015 single-ended channel voltage in mV

ads1015_read_differential.tooltip: Read the ADS1015 differential input raw value

ads1015_read_differential_mv.tooltip: Read the ADS1015 differential input voltage in mV

ads1015_set_gain.tooltip: Set the ADS1015 programmable gain amplifier range

ads1015_conversion_ready.tooltip: Read the ADS1015 conversion ready status
